节点.描述: 模块头结点，源自 @kit 注释

节点.功能描述: Provides internationalization related APIs.
Provides the options of Locale.

Calendar parameter. The value can be: "buddhist", "chinese", "coptic", "dangi", "ethioaa", "ethiopic", "gregory", "hebrew", "indian", "islamic", "islamic-umalqura", "islamic-tbla", "islamic-civil", "islamic-rgsa", "iso8601", "japanese", "persian", "roc", or "islamicc".

Collation parameter. The value can be: "big5han", "compat", "dict", "direct", "ducet", "emoji", "eor", "gb2312", "phonebk", "phonetic", "pinyin", "reformed, "search", "searchjl", "standard", "stroke", "trad", "unihan", "zhuyin"
Hour cycle. The value can be: "h11", "h12", "h23", or "h24".

Numbering system. The value can be: "adlm", "ahom", "arab", "arabext", "bali", "beng", "bhks", "brah", "cakm", "cham", "deva", "diak", "fullwide", "gong", "gonm", "gujr", "guru", "hanidec", "hmng", "hmnp", "java", "kali", "khmr", "knda", "lana", "lanatham", "laoo", "latn", "lepc", "limb", "mathbold", "mathdbl", "mathmono", "mathsanb", "mathsans", "mlym", "modi", "mong", "mroo", "mtei", "mymr", "mymrshan", "mymrtlng", "newa", "nkoo", "olck", "orya*", "osma", "rohg", "saur", "segment", "shrd", "sind", "sinh", "sora", "sund", "takr", "talu", "tamldec", "telu", "thai", "tibt", "tirh", "vaii", "wara", or "wcho".
Wether to use special sorting rules for digits. The value "true" means to use special sorting rules for digits, and the value "false" means the opposite. The default value is "false".
Whether upper case or lower case is sorted first. The value can be "upper", "lower", or "false".
Provides APIs for obtaining locale information.
Creates a Locale object.
Creates a Locale object.
注释信息: @param { string } locale - Locale information, which consists of the language, script, and country/region.
@param { LocaleOptions } [options] -  Options for creating the Locale object.

parameters.说明: Locale information, which consists of the language, script, and country/region.
LocaleOptions } [options] -  Options for creating the Locale object.

节点.功能描述: Language associated with the locale, for example, "zh". The value complies with the ISO 639 standard.
Script type of the language, for example, "Hans". The value complies with the Unicode ISO 15924 standard.
Country/region associated with the locale, for example, "CN". The value complies with the ISO 3166 standard.
Locale information, which consists of the language, script, and country/region, for example, "zh-Hans-CN".
Whether case is taken into account for the locale's collation rules. The value can be: "upper", "lower", or "false".

Calendar for the locale. The value can be: "buddhist", "chinese", "coptic", "dangi", "ethioaa", "ethiopic", "gregory", "hebrew", "indian", "islamic", "islamic-umalqura", "islamic-tbla", "islamic-civil", "islamic-rgsa", "iso8601", "japanese", "persian", "roc", or "islamicc".

Collation rules for the locale. The value can be: "big5han", "compat", "dict", "direct", "ducet", "eor", "gb2312", "phonebk", "phonetic", "pinyin", "reformed", "searchjl", "stroke", "trad", "unihan", or "zhuyin".
Time system for the locale. The value can be: "h11", "h12", "h23", or "h24".

Numbering system for the locale. The value can be: "adlm", "ahom", "arab", "arabext", "bali", "beng", "bhks", "brah", "cakm", "cham", "deva", "diak", "fullwide", "gong", "gonm", "gujr", "guru", "hanidec", "hmng", "hmnp", "java", "kali", "khmr", "knda", "lana", "lanatham", "laoo", "latn", "lepc", "limb", "mathbold", "mathdbl", "mathmono", "mathsanb", "mathsans", "mlym", "modi", "mong", "mroo", "mtei", "mymr", "mymrshan", "mymrtlng", "newa", "nkoo", "olck", "orya", "osma", "rohg", "saur", "segment", "shrd", "sind", "sinh", "sora", "sund", "takr", "talu", "tamldec", "telu", "thai", "tibt", "tirh", "vaii", "wara", or "wcho".
Wether to use special sorting rules for digits. The value "true" means to use special sorting rules for digits, and the value "false" means the opposite. The default value is "false".
Obtains the string that represents a Locale object.
注释信息: @returns { string } String that represents the Locale object.
节点.return_description: String that represents the Locale object.

节点.功能描述: Maximizes locale information by supplementing the missing script and country/region information.
注释信息: @returns { Locale } Locale object with the script and country/region information.
节点.return_description: Locale object with the script and country/region information.

节点.功能描述: Minimizes locale information by removing the script and country/region information.
注释信息: @returns { Locale } Locale object without the script and country/region information.
节点.return_description: Locale object without the script and country/region information.

节点.功能描述: Defines the options for a DateTimeOptions object. Since API version 9, the DateTimeOptions attribute is changed from mandatory to optional.
Valid locale ID, for example, "zh-Hans-CN". The default value is the current system locale.
Date display format. The value can be: "long", "short", "medium", "full", or "auto".
Time display format. The value can be: "long", "short", "medium", "full", or "auto".
Hour cycle. The value can be: "h11", "h12", "h23", or "h24".
Time zone in use. The value is a valid IANA time zone ID.

Numbering system. The value can be: "adlm", "ahom", "arab", "arabext", "bali", "beng", "bhks", "brah", "cakm", "cham", "deva", "diak", "fullwide", "gong", "gonm", "gujr", "guru", "hanidec", "hmng", "hmnp", "java", "kali", "khmr", "knda", "lana", "lanatham", "laoo", "latn", "lepc", "limb", "mathbold", "mathdbl", "mathmono", "mathsanb", "mathsans", "mlym", "modi", "mong", "mroo", "mtei", "mymr", "mymrshan", "mymrtlng", "newa", "nkoo", "olck", "orya", "osma", "rohg", "saur", "segment", "shrd", "sind", "sinh", "sora", "sund", "takr", "talu", "tamldec", "telu", "thai", "tibt", "tirh", "vaii", "wara", or "wcho".

Whether to use the 12-hour clock. The value true means to use the 12-hour clock, and the value false means the opposite. If both hour12 and hourCycle are set, hourCycle does not take effect. If hour12 and hourCycle are not set and the 24-hour clock is turned on, the default value of hour12 is false.
Week display format. The value can be: "long", "short", "narrow", or "auto".
Epoch display format. The value can be: "long", "short", "narrow", or "auto".
Year display format. The value can be: "numeric" or "2-digit".
Month display format. The value can be: "numeric", "2-digit", "long", "short", "narrow", or "auto".
Day display format. The value can be: "numeric" or "2-digit".
Hour display format. The value can be: "numeric" or "2-digit".
Minute display format. The value can be: "numeric" or "2-digit".
Second display format. The value can be: "numeric" or "2-digit".
Localized representation of a time zone name. The value can be: "long", "short", or "auto".
Time period display format. The value can be: "long", "short", "narrow", or "auto".
Locale matching algorithm. The value can be: "lookup": exact match. "best fit": best match.
Format matching algorithm. The value can be: "basic": exact match. "best fit": best match.

节点.功能描述: Formats the date and time.
注释信息: @param { Date } date - Date and time. Note: The month starts from 0. For example, 0 indicates January.
@returns { string } A string containing the formatted date and time.

parameters.说明: Date and time. Note: The month starts from 0. For example, 0 indicates January.

节点.return_description: A string containing the formatted date and time.

节点.功能描述: Formats date and time ranges. January.
注释信息: @param { Date } startDate - Start date and time. Note: The month starts from 0. For example, 0 indicates
@param { Date } endDate - End date and time. Note: The month starts from 0. For example, 0 indicates January.
@returns { string } a date string formatted based on the specified locale.

parameters.说明: Start date and time. Note: The month starts from 0. For example, 0 indicates
End date and time. Note: The month starts from 0. For example, 0 indicates January.

节点.return_description: a date string formatted based on the specified locale.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the options for creating a DateTimeOptions object.
注释信息: @returns { DateTimeOptions } Options for the DateTimeOptions object.

节点.功能描述: Options for creating the NumberFormat object. Since API version 9, the NumberOptions attribute is changed from mandatory to optional.
Valid locale ID, for example, "zh-Hans-CN". The default value is the current system locale.

Currency unit. The value must comply with the [ISO-4217 standard](https://www.iso.org/iso-4217-currency-codes.html), for example, "EUR", "CNY", and "USD". From API version 12, a three-digit number is supported, for example, "978", "156", or "840".
urrency unit symbol. The value can be "standard" or "accounting". The default value is "standard".
Currency display mode. The value can be "symbol", "narrowSymbol", "code", or "name". The default value is "symbol".

Unit name, for example, "meter", "inch", or "hectare". The combination units supported since API version 18 are as follows: "beat-per-minute", "body-weight-per-second", "breath-per-minute", "foot-per-hour", "jump-rope-per-minute", "meter-per-hour", "milliliter-per-minute-per-kilogram", "rotation-per-minute", "step-per-minute", and "stroke-per-minute".
Display format of units. The value can be "long", "short", or "narrow". The default value is "short".

Application scenario of units. The value can be any of the following: "default", "area-land-agricult", "area-land-commercl", "area-land-residntl", "length-person", "length-person-small", "length-rainfall", "length-road", "length-road-small", "length-snowfall", "length-vehicle", "length-visiblty", "length-visiblty-small", "length-person-informal", "length-person-small-informal", "length-road-informal", "speed-road-travel", "speed-wind", "temperature-person", "temperature-weather", "volume-vehicle-fuel", "elapsed-time-second", "size-file-byte", or "size-shortfile-byte". The default value is "default".

Number sign display format. The value can be: "auto": automatically determines whether to display the plus or minus sign. "never": do not display the plus or minus sign. "always": always displays the plus or minus sign. "exceptZero": displays the plus or minus sign for all values except 0. Default value: "auto".
Compact display format. The value can be "long" or "short". The default value is "short".
Number notation. The value can be: "standard", "scientific", "engineering", or "compact". The default value is "standard".
Locale matching algorithm. The value can be "lookup" or "best fit". The default value is "best fit".
Number display format. The value can be "decimal", "currency", "percent", or "unit". The default value is "decimal".

Numbering system. The value can be: "adlm", "ahom", "arab", "arabext", "bali", "beng", "bhks", "brah", "cakm", "cham", "deva", "diak", "fullwide", "gong", "gonm", "gujr", "guru", "hanidec", "hmng", "hmnp", "java", "kali", "khmr", "knda", "lana", "lanatham", "laoo", "latn", "lepc", "limb", "mathbold", "mathdbl", "mathmono", "mathsanb", "mathsans", "mlym", "modi", "mong", "mroo", "mtei", "mymr", "mymrshan", "mymrtlng", "newa", "nkoo", "olck", "orya", "osma", "rohg", "saur", "segment", "shrd", "sind", "sinh", "sora", "sund", "takr", "talu", "tamldec", "telu", "thai", "tibt", "tirh", "vaii", "wara", or "wcho".
Whether to enable grouping for display. The value "true" means to enable grouping for display, and the value "false" means the opposite. The default value is "true".
Minimum number of digits allowed in the integer part of a number. The value ranges from 1 to 21. The default value is 1.
Minimum number of digits in the fraction part of a number. The value ranges from 0 to 20. The default value is 0.
Maximum number of digits in the fraction part of a number. The value ranges from 1 to 21. The default value is 3.
Minimum number of the least significant digits. The value ranges from 1 to 21. The default value is 1.
Maximum number of the least significant digits. The value ranges from 1 to 21. The default value is 21.

Rounding priority used when both the maximum number of fraction digits and the maximum number of valid digits are set. The value can be: "auto", "morePrecision", or "lessPrecision". The value "morePrecision" indicates that the maximum number of fraction digits is used. The value "lessPrecision" indicates that the maximum number of valid digits is used. The default value is "auto".
Rounding increment. The value can be: 1, 2, 5, 10, 20, 25, 50, 100, 200, 250, 500, 1000, 2000, 2500, or 5000. The default value is 1.

Rounding mode. The value can be: "ceil": rounding up. "floor": rounding down. "expand": rounding away from 0. "trunc": rounding toward 0. "halfCeil": half-rounding up; that is, rounding up when the decimal number is greater than or equal to half of the increment, and rounding down otherwise. "halfFloor": half-rounding down; that is, rounding up when the decimal number is greater than half of the increment, and rounding down otherwise. "halfExpand": half-rounding away from 0; that is, rounding away from 0 when the decimal number is greater than or equal to half of the increment, and rounding toward 0 otherwise. "halfTrunc": half-rounding toward 0; that is, rounding away from 0 when the decimal number is greater than half of the increment, and rounding toward 0 otherwise. "halfEven": half-rounding to the nearest even number; that is, rounding away from 0 when the decimal number is greater than half of the increment, rounding toward 0 when the decimal number is less than half of the increment, and rounding to the nearest even number when the decimal number is exactly half of the increment. The default value is "halfExpand".

节点.功能描述: Defines the options for creating a Collator object.
Locale matching algorithm. The value can be "lookup" or "best fit". The default value is "best fit".
Whether the comparison is for sorting or for searching. The value can be "sort" or "search". The default value is "sort".
Differences in the strings that lead to non-zero return values. The value can be "base", "accent", "case", or "letiant". The default value is "variant".
Whether to ignore punctuation. The value "true" means to ignore punctuation, and the value "false" means the opposite. The default value is "false".

Collation rule. The value can be any of the following: "big5han", "compat", "dict", "direct", "ducet", "eor", "gb2312", "phonebk", "phonetic", "pinyin", "reformed", "searchjl", "stroke", "trad", "unihan", or "zhuyin". The default value is "default".
Whether to use numeric collation. The value "true" means to use numeric collation, and the value "false" means the opposite. The default value is "false".
Whether upper case or lower case is sorted first. The value can be "upper", "lower", or "false". The default value is "false".
Enable language-sensitive string comparison.
Creates a Collator object.
Creates a Collator object. the first valid locale ID is used.
注释信息: @param { string | Array<string> } locale - Locale ID or locale ID array. If the input is a locale ID array,
@param { CollatorOptions } [options] - Options for creating a Collator object.

parameters.说明: Locale ID or locale ID array. If the input is a locale ID array,
CollatorOptions } [options] - Options for creating a Collator object.

节点.功能描述: Compares two strings based on the specified collation rules. second string. If the value is 0, the first and second strings are in the same sequence. If the value is a positive number, the first string is comes after the second string.
注释信息: @param { string } first - First string to compare.
@param { string } second - Second string to compare.
@returns { number } Comparison result. If the value is a negative number, the first string comes before the

parameters.说明: First string to compare.
Second string to compare.

注释信息: @returns { CollatorOptions } Options for creating a Collator object.
节点.return_description: Options for creating a Collator object.

节点.功能描述: Provides the options of PluralRules
Locale matching algorithm. The value can be "lookup" or "best fit". The default value is "best fit".
Collation type. The value can be "cardinal" or "ordinal". The default value is "cardinal". The value "cardinal" indicates a cardinal number and the value "ordinal" indicates an ordinal number.
Minimum number of digits allowed in the integer part of a number. The value ranges from 1 to 21. The default value is 1.
Minimum number of digits in the fraction part of a number. The value ranges from 0 to 20. The default value is 0.
Maximum number of digits in the fraction part of a number. The value ranges from 1 to 21. The default value is 3.
Minimum number of the least significant digits. The value ranges from 1 to 21. The default value is 1.
Maximum number of the least significant digits. The value ranges from 1 to 21. The default value is 21.
Enables plural-sensitive formatting and plural-related language rules.
Creates a PluralRules object to obtain the singular-plural type of numbers.
Creates a PluralRules object to obtain the singular-plural type of numbers. the first valid locale ID is used.
注释信息: @param { string | Array<string> } locale - Locale ID or locale ID array. If the input is a locale ID array,
@param { PluralRulesOptions } [options] - Options for creating a PluralRules object.

parameters.说明: Locale ID or locale ID array. If the input is a locale ID array,
PluralRulesOptions } [options] - Options for creating a PluralRules object.

节点.功能描述: Obtains the singular-plural type of the specified number. "many", "others". For details about the meanings of different values, see [Language Plural Rules](https://www.unicode.org/cldr/charts/45/supplemental/language_plural_rules.html).
注释信息: @param { number } n - Number for which the singular-plural type is to be obtained.
@returns { string } Singular-plural type. The value can be any of the following: "zero", "one", "two", "few",

parameters.说明: Number for which the singular-plural type is to be obtained.

节点.return_description: Singular-plural type. The value can be any of the following: "zero", "one", "two", "few",

节点.功能描述: Provides the input options of RelativeTimeFormat.
Locale matching algorithm. The value can be "lookup" or "best fit". The default value is "best fit".
Format of the output message. The value can be "always" or "auto". The default value is "always".
Length of an internationalized message. The value can be "long", "short", or "narrow". The default value is "long".
Provides the resolved options of RelativeTimeFormat.
Locale ID, including the language, script, and region.
